description_long: This is a classic cylindrical metal trash bin with a slightly domed, removable lid featuring a central raised handle. The body of the bin is vertically ribbed for structural reinforcement and visual texture, with subtle metallic highlights along the edges. Two robust, side-mounted external handles are attached near the top rim, allowing for easy lifting and transport. The surface is a dark, matte gray with some worn metallic accents, suggesting frequent use and exposure to urban environments. The lid fits snugly over the top, and there are no visible wheels or labeling. This type of bin is commonly found on city sidewalks, in parks, or near garages for general waste collection.
description: A cylindrical, ribbed metal trash bin with a domed removable lid and side-mounted handles, finished in dark gray with metallic highlights. It has a utilitarian, urban appearance and no visible wheels or signage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the domed lid with a central handle and both side-mounted handles visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one of the external handles and the lid's central handle, with ribbed body details.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the domed lid and both side handles, with ribbing visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the other external handle and the lid's central handle, with ribbed body details.
